description: UF CLAS Computer Science critical-tracking milestones. Semester 1: MAC 2311. Semester 2: MAC 2311. Semester 3: MAC 2312. Semester 4: MAC 2313 and PHY 2048/2048L or PHY 2053/2053L with 2.5 GPA on critical-tracking courses. Semester 5: COP 3502C and PHY 2049/2049L or PHY 2054/2054L. Semester 6: COP 3503C and COT 3100. Semester 7: COP 3530. Semester 8: COP 4600. Minimum 2.0 UF GPA required each term; 2.5 GPA on critical-tracking courses from semester 4 onward.

Required foundational coursework totaling 29-32 credits: one technical writing course (ENC 3246, ENC 2210, or ENC 3253), calculus sequence MAC 2311-2313, linear algebra MAS 4105 or MAS 3114, two physics courses with labs, and STA 3032 engineering statistics. Minimum grade C in major coursework.

Required computing core: Programming Fundamentals 1 and 2, Discrete Structures, and Data Structures and Algorithm. COP 3504C may substitute for COP 3502C and COP 3503C with 4 additional elective credits.

Required major core totaling 21 credits: computer organization, software engineering, database systems, senior project, programming languages, algorithms, and operating systems. CIS 4914 or EGN 4952 satisfies senior project requirement.

Nine credits of major electives from any 4000-level or higher CISE course beyond core requirements. Examples include CIS 4504 Computer Networks, CIS 4930 Special Topics, CIS 4905 individual study. Advisor approval required for co-op, internship, and individual study credits.
Freshman fall model plan: Quest 1 (3), COP 3502C Programming Fundamentals 1 critical tracking (4), MAC 2311 Calculus 1 critical tracking (4), State Core Gen Ed Composition (3). Total 14 credits.
Freshman spring model plan: COP 3503C (4), COT 3100 (3), MAC 2312 (4), PHY 2048 with lab (5). Total 15-16 credits.

category: Model Semester Plan — Summer After Semester Two
description: Summer after freshman year: Gen Ed Biological Sciences (3), State Core Gen Ed Social and Behavioral Sciences (3), State Core Gen Ed Humanities (3). Total 9 credits.
Sophomore fall model plan — Alex Hales current term: CDA 3101 (3), COP 3530 Data Structures critical tracking (3), MAC 2313 (4), PHY 2049 with lab (5). Total 14-15 credits.
Sophomore spring model plan: Quest 2 (3), CEN 3031 Software Engineering (3), CIS 4301 Databases (3), ENC 3246 or linear algebra MAS 3114/MAS 4105 (3-4). Total 15-16 credits.
Junior fall model plan: COP 4600 Operating Systems critical tracking (3), STA 3032 (3), CLAS Foreign Language (4-5), Gen Ed Social Science (3). COP 4600 requires COP 3530 and CDA 3101.
Junior spring model plan: COP 4020 (3), COP 4533 (3), foreign language continuation (3-5), Gen Ed Humanities (3).
Senior fall model plan: Gen Ed courses and 6 credits of major electives plus elective.
Senior spring model plan: CIS 4914 Senior Project (3), major elective (3), electives (4), Gen Ed Biological Sciences (3). Exit interview required.
